ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region or country */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "na_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the NA item (e.g., GDP, inflation rate) */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time period */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the dataset */,
  "flag_and_footnotes" TEXT /* Flag and footnotes associated with the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "dataset_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "dataset_status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_na_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("na_item_id") REFERENCES na_items ("na_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES times ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geos ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geos" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region or country */,
  "geo_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic group */,
  "geo_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region or country */,
  "geo_description" TEXT /* Description of the geographic region or country */,
  "geo_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the geographic region or country */,
  "geo_population" INTEGER /* Population of the geographic region or country */,
  "geo_area" REAL /* Area of the geographic region or country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measurement */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit of measurement */,
  "unit_precision" INTEGER /* Precision of the unit (e.g., 2 decimal places) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "na_items" (
  "na_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NA item */,
  "na_item_name" TEXT /* Name of the NA item */,
  "na_item_description" TEXT /* Description of the NA item */,
  "na_item_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the NA item */,
  "na_item_formula" TEXT /* Formula or equation related to the NA item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("na_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "time_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period */,
  "time_description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  "time_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "time_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "time_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments for the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_sources" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_privileges" TEXT /* Privileges associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Level of the permission (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_groups" (
  "geo_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic group */,
  "geo_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic group */,
  "geo_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the geographic group */,
  "geo_group_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the geographic group */,
  "geo_group_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the geographic group */,
  "geo_group_area" REAL /* Total area of the geographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_group_members" (
  "geo_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic group */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_group_id", "geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the dataset */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "tag")
)
